title: [codereview] coap_dtn.c: coap_respond lacks OSCORE and rate-limit checks per spec for /deaddrop
description: spec/11-lci.md:17.5.8 and 12-apps.md:18.9 require OSCORE for POST to /deaddrop (4.01 if missing), rate limiting. Current coap_respond in lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:41 does not integrate oscore or dtn provider callbacks. P2 security gap. lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:55
